{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}{{ registration.registration_id }} - Asian Night Market{% endblock %} {% block content %}

{{ registration.business_name }}

{{ registration.registration_id }} · {{ registration.status | title }}

{% if registration.status == "rejected" and registration.rejection_reason %}
Rejection reason: {{ registration.rejection_reason }}
{% endif %}
Business Information
Category
{{ "Food" if registration.category == "food" else "Non-Food" }}
{% if registration.cuisine_type %}
Cuisine Type
{{ registration.cuisine_type }}
{% endif %}
Description
{{ registration.description }}
Contact Information
Name
{{ registration.contact_name }}
Email
{{ registration.email }}
Phone
{{ registration.phone }}
Booth Details
Booth Type
{{ booth_type.name if booth_type else 'N/A' }}
Price
${{ "%.2f" | format(booth_type.price / 100) if booth_type else 'N/A' }}
Utilities
{% set utilities = [] %} {% if registration.needs_power %}{% set _ = utilities.append("Power") %}{% endif %} {% if registration.needs_water %}{% set _ = utilities.append("Water") %}{% endif %} {% if registration.needs_propane %}{% set _ = utilities.append("Propane") %}{% endif %} {{ utilities | join(", ") if utilities else "None" }}
{% if registration.status == "confirmed" or registration.amount_paid %}
Payment
{% if registration.amount_paid %}
Amount Paid
${{ "%.2f" | format(registration.amount_paid / 100) }}
{% endif %} {% if registration.refund_amount %}
Refund
${{ "%.2f" | format(registration.refund_amount / 100) }}
{% endif %}
{% endif %}
Timeline
Submitted
{{ registration.created_at.strftime('%b %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') if registration.created_at else '' }}
{% if registration.approved_at %}
Approved
{{ registration.approved_at.strftime('%b %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') }}
{% endif %} {% if registration.rejected_at %}
Rejected
{{ registration.rejected_at.strftime('%b %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') }}
{% endif %}
{% endblock %}
